title: 100 Years of Jacky Chen (Unfinished)
description:
Twitter: https://twitter.com/Deepercutts
Hello again everyone, this is an unfinished version of my latest project. I just felt that this was a video I couldn’t get finished, so I decided to just upload everything that I made for it. It’s not one I’m particularly happy about, but I didn’t want to put the idea to waste.

For those interested, the video was suggested in the poll when I was working on my old Yu-gi-oh project. It sadly took me a very long time to get started on it, many issues rose up in my real life and I wasn’t able to willingly finish it. I tried to discuss the fate of the project to some of my followers on twitter and I just felt that it was best to just upload this the way it is.

Regardless, I hope you guys enjoy. I'm sorry to keep you waiting.
